---
title: "style.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/calculus/style.ts"
loc: 23
complexity: 4
logic_score: 6.72
style_score: 9.41
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 8.74
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `calculateStyleScore`
- `calculateStyleScore`
- `elements`
- `arbitraryValues`
- `lines`
- `claustrophobicCount`
- `consecutiveLogic`
- `utilitySymmetry`
- `order`
- `complexity`
- `measure`
